chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3603 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ لِأَبِي اَلرَّبِيعِ اَلشَّامِيِّ : "لاَ تُخَالِطِ اَلْأَكْرَادَ فَإِنَّ اَلْأَكْرَادَ حَيٌّ مِنَ اَلْجِنِّ كَشَفَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَنْهُمُ اَلْغِطَاءَ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3603 - Imam (as) said to Abu Al-Rabi' Al-Shami:
"Do not associate with the Kurds, for the Kurds are a group from the Jinn whom Allah (swt), the Almighty and Majestic, has removed the veil from."
